mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, avatar, phone, password, role, credit_score AS creditScore, status, collect_count AS collectCount, follow_count AS followCount, order_count AS orderCount, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, nickname, avatar, phone, password, role, credit_score AS creditScore, status, collect_count AS collectCount, follow_count AS followCount, order_count AS orderCount, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (nickname, avatar, phone, password, role, credit_score, status) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{password}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'user'), COALESCE(#{creditScore}, 100), COALESCE(#{status}, 'active'))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, credit_score = #{creditScore}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, avatar, phone, password, role, credit_score AS creditScore, status, collect_count AS collectCount, follow_count AS followCount, order_count AS orderCount, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM t_user ORDER BY id
